creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jadawin     2010-11-19 09:44:17 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/goaccess    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    sysutils/goaccess/files patch-util.c 
  Log:
  GoAccess is an open source real-time Apache web log analyzer and interactive
  viewer that runs in a terminal and provides fast and valuable HTTP statistics
  for system administrators that require a visual report on the fly.
  
  WWW:    http://goaccess.prosoftcorp.com/
  
  PR:             ports/152332
  Submitted by:   Sofian Brabez <sbrabez at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1250    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +44 -0     ports/sysutils/goaccess/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/sysutils/goaccess/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/sysutils/goaccess/files/patch-util.c (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/goaccess/pkg-descr (new)
